title: Bar Leaner 1-Span Collaborative
brand_hint: Axis Bar Leaners (1-Span = single bay frame)

specs.dimensions: Bar height 41"H; 1-span worktop options from 48"W × 24"D to 96"W × 48"D
specs.materials: Steel frame with unobtrusive foot design, laminate worktop
key_features: Frame supports a variety of worktop sizes
specs.notes: BBI list price ~$699.99. Axis is the brand line; 1-Span vs 2-Span/3-Span differentiates frame width. Specific worktop size for BBI's SKU not surfaced; verify with supplier.
specs.who_its_for: This bar-height leaner is well-suited to open-plan government offices and educational staff rooms that want a standing meeting surface without committing floor space to a permanent table.
